Headline: #79 79th Temporary Reroute at 79th/Jeffrey
ShortDescription: 79 79th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions , due to street blockage near 79th/Jeffrey.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#79 79th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 79th, Yates, 76th, Jeffrey, 79th, and over normal route, due to street blockage near 79th/Jeffrey.

Allow extra travel time.
